codeReview.summary: L1-L4 autonomy levels correctly implemented in swell-core types and swell-orchestrator autonomy module. All approval logic matches expected behavior.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The feature's workerSessionIds in features.json is empty [], indicating no worker session was recorded. This is unusual - either the feature was implemented directly by the main agent or the handoff mechanism wasn't used.

summary: Feature orch-autonomy-levels PASSES review. Implementation correctly defines AutonomyLevel enum (L1-Supervised, L2-Guided, L3-Autonomous, L4-FullAuto) in swell-core/src/types.rs and implements AutonomyController in swell-orchestrator/src/autonomy.rs. All approval methods (needs_plan_approval, needs_step_approval, needs_validation_approval) correctly implement the expected behavior: L1 requires all approvals, L2 requires plan approval only, L3 requires approval for high-risk actions only, L4 requires no approvals. 10 unit tests pass covering all autonomy scenarios. Build and clippy pass without errors.
